channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Pothole near the junction of Langley Road and The Hyde, dangerous for cyclists, 23rd March
item.description:
On the junction near the pavement
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Langley Road, Winchcombe, Winchcombe
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter problem reported on the A40, 22nd March
Litter dumped outside number 170b, 22nd March
item.description:
Please could it be dealt with

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 159, Leckhampton Road, Leckhampton, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: One Stop car park is becoming unusable, 22nd March
item.description:
The car park of the One Stop on the Crosshands roundabout is in such a terrible state. The pot holes are now enormous, I don’t think they can be called potholes anymore! This is getting worse and worse. Soon, the car park will be too dangerous to use.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Shurdington Road, Brockworth, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Two items of furniture apparently dumped., 22nd March
item.description:
Furniture, wardrobe, chest.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Laxton Road, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Flytipping (not witnessed and no evidence likely)

item.title: Multiple large potholes covering across the entire junction, 22nd March
item.description:
On the junction as you turn into and out of Ullenwood Manor Road.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ullenwood Manor Lane, Coberley, Cotswold
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large pothole on right hand side lane, 22nd March
item.description:
Large pothole in middle of right hand side lane heading northbound. Unable to be avoided due to size and location if travelling in right hand side lane.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hucclecote Road, Hucclecote, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pavement surface dangerous,uneven and worn away and extremely uneven, 22nd March
item.description:
Outside no 22 Everest road ,GL539LG
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 20, Everest Road, Naunton, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Other damage to pavement i.e. cobbles, raised mound/surface

item.title: Traffic diversion sign had been left for weeks, 22nd March
item.description:
On the small island in front of Pittville Gates at the junction with Clarence Road and Prestbury Road.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Prestbury Road, Marle Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Signs & Barriers left behind by Contractor

item.title: Please empty the poo bin, 22nd March
item.description:
Please can you arrange for someone to empty the dog poo bin? Thank you.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hartley Lane, Coberley, Cotswold
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned car SA59 Ford Mondeo, 22nd March
item.description:
Car parked outside 49 brioklyn road is abandoned.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 51, Brooklyn Road, Wymans Brook, Cheltenham

At the car park off North Place

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Northfield Terrace, Marle Hill, Cheltenham

Medium box of furniture pieces

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Saint Paul's Road, Marle Hill, Cheltenham

item.title: Flood sign abandoned. Has now been here for 4+ months, 22nd March
item.description:
Outside 67 Colwell Avenue GL3 3LU Been abandoned for 4+ months

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Colwell Avenue, Hucclecote, Gloucester

item.category: Signs & Barriers left behind by Contractor

item.title: Glass in underpass, 22nd March
item.description:
In underpass underneath A40 near GCHQ
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Gloucester Road, Hatherley, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Denied access through slate mill farm, 22nd March
item.description:
The gates to slate mill farm. Was not allowed to continue through farm on footpath. Informed that footpath does not go through farm.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cheltenham Road, Leigh, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipped items, 22nd March
item.description:
Box of cladding at the corner of Midwinter Avenue and Elmfield

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 26,28,30,32, Elmfield Avenue, Wymans Brook, Cheltenham

item.title: Bags of Litter, 22nd March
item.description:
Bags of litter by the public bin on the crossroads

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Goldsmith Road, Churchdown, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Drain cover sinking, 22nd March
item.description:
The drain cover is sinking by the bus stop and lights. As you drive over it, it clangs loudly and can damage tyres and suspension
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Princess Elizabeth Way, Kingsditch, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sink holes, 22nd March
item.description:
Loads of sinks holes about to appear as the tarmac has sunken a lot in several areas leading up to speed bumps
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 209, Arle Road, Marle Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
